_comment: Market context per target role. Source: Lenny's 'State of the product job market in early 2026'. Only include roles with direct data — omit roles not covered.
_source: State of the product job market in early 2026

AI Engineer.headline: Explosive demand
AI Engineer.detail: AI engineering is on a hockey-stick growth curve — among the fastest-growing roles in tech in early 2026, with a third of all AI roles concentrated in the Bay Area.

AI PM.headline: Explosive demand
AI PM.detail: AI PM demand is surging alongside AI engineering. One of the fastest-growing PM specializations in early 2026.

Chief Product Officer.headline: Strong market
Chief Product Officer.detail: PM roles broadly are at their highest levels since 2022 — up 75% from 2023 lows, with 20% growth since the start of 2026.

Chief Marketing Officer.headline: Mixed signals
Chief Marketing Officer.detail: Marketing leadership is not broken out separately in the 2026 report; PM and growth-adjacent hiring is up sharply, while brand and design-heavy functions have been flatter since 2023.

Chief of Staff.headline: Mixed signals
Chief of Staff.detail: Chief of staff roles are not separately tracked in the 2026 report; demand tends to follow general leadership and operator hiring at your company stage.

Data Analyst.headline: Mixed signals
Data Analyst.detail: Data roles are not separately tracked in the 2026 report, but engineering demand broadly remains strong with no AI-driven slowdown.

Data Scientist.headline: Mixed signals
Data Scientist.detail: Data science roles are not separately tracked in the 2026 report, but engineering demand broadly remains strong with no AI-driven slowdown.

Director of Product.headline: Strong market
Director of Product.detail: PM roles broadly are at their highest levels since 2022 — up 75% from 2023 lows, with 20% growth since the start of 2026.

Director of UX.headline: Challenging market
Director of UX.detail: Design hiring has been flat since early 2023. PM openings now outnumber design openings 1.27:1 — a ratio that was at parity just two years ago.

Engineering Manager.headline: Strong market
Engineering Manager.detail: Engineering demand remains strong — 67,000+ open positions globally in early 2026, with recruiter hiring near 2022 peak levels.

Founder / CEO.headline: Strong conditions
Founder / CEO.detail: Marc Andreessen and leading AI-era founders describe a moment where a single person with AI tools can build what previously required a team — lowering the barrier to founding.

Growth Manager.headline: Strong market
Growth Manager.detail: PM roles broadly are at their highest levels since 2022 — up 75% from 2023 lows, with 20% growth since the start of 2026.

Marketing Manager.headline: Mixed signals
Marketing Manager.detail: Marketing IC roles are not separately tracked in the 2026 report; growth and product hiring is strong, while some brand and design pipelines remain tight.

Principal PM.headline: Strong market
Principal PM.detail: PM roles broadly are at their highest levels since 2022 — up 75% from 2023 lows, with 20% growth since the start of 2026.

Product Designer.headline: Challenging market
Product Designer.detail: Design hiring has been flat since early 2023. PM openings now outnumber design openings 1.27:1 — a ratio that was at parity two years ago. AI-enabled engineering speed is reducing traditional design process involvement.

Product Manager.headline: Strong market
Product Manager.detail: PM openings are at their highest levels since 2022 — up 75% from 2023 lows and 20% growth since the start of 2026. Bay Area accounts for 23% of all open PM roles globally.

Software Engineer.headline: Strong market
Software Engineer.detail: Engineering demand remains strong — 67,000+ open positions globally in early 2026 with no slowdown from AI adoption. Engineering recruiter hiring is near 2022 peak levels.

Staff Engineer.headline: Strong market
Staff Engineer.detail: Engineering demand remains strong — 67,000+ open positions globally in early 2026 with no slowdown from AI adoption.

UX Lead.headline: Challenging market
UX Lead.detail: Design hiring has been flat since early 2023. PM openings now outnumber design openings 1.27:1 — a ratio that was at parity just two years ago.

UX Researcher.headline: Challenging market
UX Researcher.detail: Design hiring has been flat since early 2023 and UX research roles face particular pressure. PM openings now outnumber design openings 1.27:1.

VP of Product.headline: Strong market
VP of Product.detail: PM roles broadly are at their highest levels since 2022 — up 75% from 2023 lows, with 20% growth since the start of 2026.

VP of Engineering / CTO.headline: Strong market
VP of Engineering / CTO.detail: Engineering demand remains strong — 67,000+ open positions globally in early 2026, with recruiter hiring near 2022 peak levels. Leadership engineering tracks benefit from the same tight market for senior ICs and managers.
